notes.note: The comms is through WhatsApp - SP is highly unresponsive. The major concern is that the access to their profile is with the previous owner. I'm constantly trying to get in touch to resolve this concern. We have to give 1 month free to the client. Also the business shows permanently closed. SP has requested to cancel the services - created a churn ticket already and we have refunded the recent subscription as well

candidate_facts.value: Profile access is with the previous owner, not current stakeholder
candidate_facts.source_quote: the access to their profile is with the previous owner
candidate_facts.confidence_note: Explicit operational blocker preventing customer control
Clear statement of business operational status

candidate_facts.source_quote: SP has requested to cancel the services - created a churn ticket already and we have refunded the recent subscription as well
candidate_facts.confidence_note: Explicit churn: cancellation requested, churn ticket created, refund issued

candidate_facts.value: Customer given 1 month free service as retention/compensation effort.
candidate_facts.source_quote: We have to give 1 month free to the client
candidate_facts.confidence_note: Explicit mention of promotional credit being applied

extraction_meta.extractor_summary: Sante Wellness & Aesthetics is a churned customer with a permanently closed business; critical blocker is profile access held by previous owner, and SP is unresponsive despite retention efforts including 1-month free credit.
